channel.title: HLS Protocol on cmdragon's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in HLS Protocol on cmdragon's Blog

item.title: Multi-Stream Live Aggregator Ondersteunt HLS-Protocol, Start Nieuwe Multi-Screen Live Monitoring Ervaring
item.description: De Multi-Stream Live Aggregator ondersteunt natief het HLS-protocol, volledig compatibel met mainstream live streaming platforms. Biedt 5 omschakelbare lay-outs (2×2/3×3 raster, horizontale/verticale splitsing, verticale stapeling), ondersteunt picture-in-picture modus, volledig scherm weergave, automatisch opnieuw verbinden en real-time status monitoring. Journalisten volgen breaking news gelijktijdig op meerdere platforms, sportfans leggen prachtige momenten vast vanuit meerdere hoeken, data-analisten bewaken multi-channel content parallel, start een efficiënte live monitoring ervaring op één plek.

item.title: Multi-Stream Live Aggregator Supports HLS Protocol, Opening New Multi-Screen Live Monitoring Experience
item.description: The Multi-Stream Live Aggregator natively supports the HLS protocol, fully compatible with mainstream live streaming platforms. Provides 5 switchable layouts (2×2/3×3 grid, horizontal/vertical split, vertical stacking), supports picture-in-picture mode, full-screen playback, automatic reconnection and real-time status monitoring. Journalists track breaking news across multiple platforms simultaneously, sports fans capture wonderful moments from multiple angles, data analysts monitor multi-channel content in parallel, start an efficient live monitoring experience in one place.
